title: Refactor unittest for varlink component
body:
- Allow unittest's to run as normal user
- Refactor tests to use unittest features
- Refactor tests to use fixtures to track resources
- Update test runner script to clean up on failure

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude We're already running the varlink tests in the integration test suite, right?
@jwhonce Second PR is not signed.  Merge together or sign second one.
LGTM.  I assume next steps is to populate the image tests?
